odbc.description: Optional ODBC diagnostics snapshot, attached when the agent runs on a host with ODBC native metrics collection enabled. Absent when the metrics service is not configured.

available.description: Whether the metrics snapshot was collected successfully. When false, 'error' may carry the reason.

snapshot.description: Raw metrics snapshot. Shape depends on the underlying ODBC driver and is intentionally open for forward compatibility.

error.description: Present only when 'available' is false; describes why the snapshot could not be produced.
